name: garden
description: Turn any folder of images into a searchable, design-focused reference library.
author: wade (ot-to.org)
capabilities: scan a folder of images and register them in a local SQLite library
extract color palettes (hex + OKLCH) deterministically, no LLM required
compute perceptual hashes for near-duplicate / similarity search
store structured tags from a vision pass: classification, components, sections, layout, typography, color scheme, effects, use cases
full-text search across tags and captions
read gallery-dl JSON sidecars (Pinterest dump compatibility)
